nasb.text: It was a handbreadth thick, and its brim was made like the brim of a cup, like a lily blossom; it could hold 3,000 baths.

esv.text: Its thickness was a handbreadth. And its brim was made like the brim of a cup, like the flower of a lily. It held 3,000 baths.

cnv.text: 銅海厚七公分半，邊緣像杯邊的做法，形狀似百合花，容量有六萬公升。

ccb.text: 铜海厚八厘米，边如杯边，又如百合花，容量为六万六千升。
